# Vendor libraries

This directory contains local, bundled libraries used by ARG探索ツール.

## jsQR

- Package: `jsqr`
- Version: `1.4.0`
- License: Apache-2.0
- Source: https://github.com/cozmo/jsQR
- Bundled file: `jsQR.js`
- License file: `jsQR-LICENSE.txt`

`jsQR` is used as a local fallback QR decoder when the browser does not provide the `BarcodeDetector` API.
